mapper.select:
select
from spotter_efficiency.case_execution_record where case_id = #{caseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by create_time desc

select
from spotter_efficiency.case_execution_record where plan_id = #{planId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by create_time desc
mapper.insert:
insert into spotter_efficiency.case_execution_record
id, case_id, project_id, plan_id, executor_id, exec_result, exec_duration, exec_start_time, exec_end_time, is_first_exec, case_cs_score, create_time, update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{executorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{duration,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{startTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{endTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isFirstExecution,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{caseCsScore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
mapper.update: update spotter_efficiency.case_execution_record set case_id = #{caseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_id = #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, plan_id = #{planId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, executor_id = #{executorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exec_result = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exec_duration = #{duration,jdbcType=BIGINT}, exec_start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, exec_end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, is_first_exec = #{isFirstExecution,jdbcType=TINYINT}, case_cs_score = #{caseCsScore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
